product_name: Outward Hound Port-A-Bowl Collapsible Dog Bowl
why: Top-selling collapsible dog bowl on Amazon. Lightweight, foldable, dishwasher-safe. The standard pick for car camping with dogs.
Vinyl-coated steel cable tie-out for medium dogs at the campsite. Standard for keeping a dog at the site without a fence.
Squeeze bottle with built-in flip bowl — water + bowl in one for trail use. Top-reviewed Amazon pick for portable dog hydration.
Portable, washable, fits in the car. Aligns with the existing Coleman-heavy gear set so the brand voice stays consistent.
Premium harness, well-reviewed, 4 sizes. The 'spend once' option for active dog campers. Ruffwear is the recognized authority brand.
Top-seller. 10 hours of warmth per pair. Stuff in pockets, sleeping bag foot box, or boots overnight. The single highest-leverage cold-weather buy.

product_name: Coleman North Rim 0°F Mummy Sleeping Bag
why: Budget winter bag — 0°F rating means real overnight comfort to the mid-20s. Mummy cut traps heat. Brand consistency with existing gear.

product_name: Klymit Insulated Static V Sleeping Pad
why: R-value 4.4 — true cold-ground insulation. Pairs with the existing Kelty Tuck 20 to extend the sleep system into shoulder season.
DIY tent footprint that adds an R-value boost to the floor. Cuts to size with scissors. Reddit-popular winter hack.
10x10 ripstop tarp with grommets. Pitches over the picnic table or as a tent vestibule extension. The 'second roof' that turns a wet weekend savable.

product_name: Frogg Toggs All Sport Rain Suit (Jacket + Pants)
why: Cult-favorite ultra-cheap rain suit. Real waterproof material — not the poncho beginners regret. Jacket + pants per person under $30.

product_name: Sea to Summit Ultra-Sil Dry Sack 8L
why: Lightweight waterproof stuff sack. Keeps clothes / electronics dry inside the tent when the rainfly drips through.
Heavy-duty 70D ripstop tarp with reinforced grommets. The 'spend once' tarp for serious wet-weather campers.
Wet, snap, wear. Stays cool 1-2 hours. The single-product fix for kids melting at a hot site. Reddit cult favorite.
D-cell battery fan that clips to a tent pole. 1-night runtime. The cheap fix for a hot tent.
Electrolyte powder. One stick per liter, drops the kid-meltdown risk on a hot site. Widely recommended for outdoor families.
USB rechargeable, 24-hour runtime, doubles as power bank. The premium upgrade for hot-region car campers who go often.
100-piece, MOLLE-compatible, organized by injury type with a printed guide. Top-reviewed Amazon kit — the right size for a family car-camping trip.

product_name: Adventure Medical Kits Mountain Day Tripper Lite
why: REI-staple kit, weather-resistant pouch, includes the basics + bug bite / blister care. Trusted brand in outdoor first aid.
Pealess emergency whistle, indestructible, audible 100+ dB. One per kid in a family group. Standard outdoor-rec safety item.
Largest legal bear spray. Only relevant in bear country (PNW, Appalachians, parts of NE / Colorado). Gate behind a 'check your park' note.
